_note: Curated subset of the AWS reserved-words list — the words that realistically conflict with attribute names in a service codebase. The full list is ~573 entries; most (e.g. ABORT, INTERSECT, ABSOLUTE) would never plausibly be chosen as an attribute name. If a future regression slips through this subset, expand the list — the source above is the canonical reference.
_format: Stored as JSON so the file is data, not code. The test helper loads it once + builds a case-insensitive Set.
